code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            count = count + 1
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(current)
  match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(v)
    if v > 0
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
println("positive=#{count}")
